_comment: Instruction-count budget for the core schema-operation workload, measured with cachegrind. Deterministic for a given build; re-record with scripts/perf_gate.py --update after an intentional change to the workload or a large compiler codegen shift. The tolerance (tightened from 0.15 to 0.10) absorbs compiler-codegen drift across toolchain versions while still catching algorithmic regressions, which are far larger; the count is CPU-independent, so this is codegen headroom, not runner noise.
